title: District Zero EP01 — Storyboard DOP-grade v1.0

SCN_002.note: Single character — axis fixed by movement direction

SCN_004.axis: Nara right / Elian left — 180° line on table between them

SCN_005.axis: Vale on upper balcony faces atrium floor (screen-down)
SCN_005.note: POV from balcony down = OK. POV from floor up = OK. No crossing.

SCN_006.axis: Mira left / Nara right — 180° line on the display between them

SCN_007.note: Analyst POVs: all facing screen = same direction

SCN_009.axis: Shutters at screen-right — characters face right toward exterior light
SCN_009.note: Cutaway to exterior: match eyeline direction

SCN_010.axis: Sprint direction: left-to-right away from pursuit (pursuit enters from screen-right)
SCN_010.note: CRITICAL: maintain for chase logic. Nara always escaping screen-left.

SCN_011.axis: Nara right / Elian left — IDENTICAL to SCN_004
SCN_011.note: CRITICAL: same apartment, same axis. Door at screen-left. Match SCN_004 for continuity.

shots.camera_spec: 32mm anamorphic, T2.3, ISO 1600, tripod low, 30cm off ground
shots.composition: Seawall occupies lower third. Drowned skyline fills upper 65% — individual towers distinct. Black water in extreme foreground as mirror. Searchbeam sweeping mid-frame.
shots.action_brief: Black water churning against the seawall base. Searchbeam cutting left-to-right. Drowned city skyline static and dead behind. An establishing shot that says: this world is already finished.
shots.lighting_context: Single 18K HMI searchbeam sweeping. Amber window-grid points in drowned city. Black water surface catching each beam pass.
shots.emotion_intent: Dread as beauty. The apocalypse has already happened and nobody announced it.
shots.audio_brief: Black water against concrete — low, constant, massive. Searchbeam motor: faint mechanical rotation above. Wind across open water. No music.

shots.camera_spec: 32mm anamorphic, T2.3, ISO 1600, tripod, slight Dutch tilt 3deg
shots.composition: Searchbeam source at upper-right. Beam crossing mid-frame left to right. Water surface occupying lower 35%. 3-degree Dutch tilt.
shots.action_brief: Searchbeam sweeping across the water surface in a slow, mechanical arc. Prison-yard rhythm. The beam finds nothing — it always finds nothing.
shots.lighting_context: HMI searchbeam as moving key. Water reflecting the beam passing over it. Between passes: near-total darkness.
shots.emotion_intent: The city is a prison and the guards don't need to see faces to maintain control.
shots.audio_brief: Searchbeam motor cycling. Water surface. Distant structural groaning of the seawall.

shots.camera_spec: 32mm anamorphic, T2.3, ISO 1600, handheld follow at running pace
shots.composition: Nara lower-left third, head at 60% height. Corridor vanishing point holds right-centre. Her forward motion creates depth. Amber wrist display pulse visible at hip level.
shots.action_brief: Mid-sprint, left leg forward. Wrist display flashing amber pressure alert below her chin on each pulse — rhythm of urgency. She's not lost, she's solving a problem at running speed.
shots.lighting_context: Backlight: amber cage lamp 30m ahead. Wrist display: amber pulse from below on each flash. Steam jet at mid-corridor catching backlight. Face in partial shadow, lit only on pulse.
shots.emotion_intent: Controlled competence in motion. This is her environment — she runs here, she knows this floor.
shots.audio_brief: Boots on steel grating at run pace. Distant mechanical hum of corridor systems. Wrist display amber beep — once, twice, then gone.

shots.composition: Wrist display occupies centre-frame. Her face above in shallow focus, expression readable. Corridor in deep bokeh behind.
shots.action_brief: She stops. A sealed route blinks on the map display — 2 seconds — then blinks off and disappears. Her thumb hovers, then captures the image. The gesture is precise, practiced.
shots.lighting_context: Wrist display glow as key — amber-orange, from below. Corridor cage lamp as backlight at distance. Face: display glow only.
shots.emotion_intent: The moment of discovery. She notices what she wasn't meant to notice — and she knows immediately.
shots.audio_brief: Run comes to a stop — footsteps cut. System beep of the wrist display. Her breathing, controlled. Then silence.

shots.composition: Nara left third, pausing at junction. The unmapped corridor entrance dark at right two-thirds. Threshold composition: she is at the edge of the known world.
shots.action_brief: She pauses at the mouth of an unmapped access corridor. One step forward, one hand on the wall edge. Looking into darkness. Then she steps through.
shots.lighting_context: Corridor cage lamp from behind — creates her silhouette against the unmapped darkness ahead. Zero light in the unmapped section. Threshold lighting.
shots.emotion_intent: The choice. She could turn back. She doesn't.
shots.audio_brief: Her hand on the corroded wall edge — metal resonance. A single footstep into the unmapped space. Then the darkness takes sound with her.

shots.composition: Nara at lower-left third against the valve assembly — machinery filling the frame at 80% height behind her. Workers as distant blurred figures at right background. Alarm strobe creating hard flash-shadows.
shots.action_brief: Both hands on a valve wheel, turning hard against pressure. Feet braced, body weight forward. Alarm strobing. The machinery dwarfs her — she is tiny against the industrial scale.
shots.lighting_context: Alarm strobe: white pulse at 0.5Hz — each flash slamming hard shadows across metal surfaces. Base: green-white emergency fluorescent at 15% between flashes. Steam backlit by overhead. Her face: strobe-lit in flash, dark between.
shots.emotion_intent: Physical competence against overwhelming scale. She is small in this space but she knows what to do.
shots.audio_brief: ALARM: 110dB industrial klaxon cycling at 0.5Hz. Hydraulic pressure groaning through the manifolds. Steam jet hiss at mid-register. Metal valve wheel grinding under load. Then the alarm CUTS — sudden silence hits like a physical impact.

shots.composition: Tight on Nara's face — centre-frame. The moment the alarm cuts. Her head rising, expression changing.
shots.action_brief: The alarm dies. Silence. Her hands release the valve. She looks up. The chamber returns to white fluorescent work light. She checks the wrist display.
shots.lighting_context: Post-alarm: white overhead fluorescent — harsh, flat, institutional. The colour warmth of the alarm is gone. Cold industrial white.
shots.emotion_intent: From crisis to clarity. The immediate danger is gone. The deeper problem just became visible.
shots.audio_brief: Alarm cuts — total silence for 1 second. Then: fluorescent hum returns. Distant steam. Workers exhaling. Her fingers on the wrist display.

shots.composition: Nara slightly right-of-centre, wrist display raised. Worker visible at left edge, turning away. Space between them deliberate — she is already somewhere else mentally.
shots.action_brief: She looks at the hidden route on her wrist display while a worker mentions the maintenance update was signed by Central Authority. She understands: this is not a technical error.
shots.lighting_context: White institutional overhead. Wrist display amber glow on her face from below — only warm element in the frame.
shots.emotion_intent: The realisation. The maintenance error was not an error.
shots.audio_brief: Worker's voice, flat and routine. Her silence in response. The ambient machinery in the background — always present, never noticed.

shots.composition: Nara right, Elian left. Wrist display between them catching both faces in amber glow. Cramped apartment filling the space around them. Both in profile — facing each other across the small table.
shots.action_brief: Nara places the captured map route in front of her father. His eyes drop to it. He freezes. A long beat. Then his jaw tightens.
shots.lighting_context: Desk lamp as key — amber 2700K, from right. Wrist display additional amber fill between them. Deep shadow filling apartment behind. Both faces partly lit, partly in shadow.
shots.emotion_intent: He recognises what he's seeing. He has seen this before, under different circumstances.
shots.audio_brief: The apartment's small sounds — a distant pipe, the neon buzz outside. The wrist display placed on the surface. His breath catching.

shots.composition: Tight on Elian's face — centre-frame. The dialogue is over. He is looking slightly left of camera — not at her, at the wall. The weight of the secret.
shots.action_brief: He says: 'Because in this city, hidden doors are never just doors.' He doesn't look at her when he says it. He looks away. He has always known this moment would come.
shots.lighting_context: Desk lamp from right — amber key on his cheek and brow. Left side in deep shadow. The broken capillaries on his nose visible under the warm light.
shots.emotion_intent: Suppressed knowledge breaking to the surface. He has been carrying this for years.
shots.audio_brief: His voice, low. The line delivered to the wall, not to her. Then silence.

shots.camera_spec: 32mm anamorphic, T2.3, ISO 400, tripod high angle
shots.composition: Atrium floor fills lower 60% — hundreds of citizens as textured movement. Giant propaganda screen at far wall. Glass balcony visible at upper-right. The authority architecture framing everything.
shots.action_brief: Director Rook addresses the district from the giant screens — his face 10 metres tall, voice echoing in the marble space. Citizens move through below in patterns that suggest choreography, not freedom.
shots.lighting_context: Diffused morning daylight through glass ceiling — cold, flat, institutional. Screen glow adding cold blue to the citizens below. The warmth of humanity has been architecturally removed.
shots.emotion_intent: Scale as control. The citizen is made small by design.
shots.audio_brief: Rook's amplified voice — calm, paternal, impenetrable. Marble reverb. Hundreds of footsteps below as diffuse texture. No individual voice audible in the crowd.

shots.composition: Vale at centre-frame on the glass balcony, slightly elevated. Glass railing in foreground bokeh. Atrium floor and citizens visible as deep background. The aide at right edge, smaller frame.
shots.action_brief: An aide hands Vale a security alert tablet. He reads it — his expression does not change. He says 'Put her under passive watch' without taking his eyes from the atrium floor. The aide hesitates. Vale has already stopped listening.
shots.lighting_context: Directional window light from right — harder key than atrium floor, 5:1 ratio. Cold 6000K. No warmth on Vale. The atrium crowd below: flat diffused, 3:1.
shots.emotion_intent: A predator identifying a thread. No urgency — he has time. He has all the time.
shots.audio_brief: Rook's voice continues below — distant, reverberant. The tablet handed over: minimal. Vale's voice: flat, no inflection. The aide's hesitation audible in the pause before footsteps retreating.

shots.composition: Mira left-of-centre, bent over the display spread. Nara right edge. Market activity behind and around them — ambient movement of traders and buyers. Neon cyan and amber lighting separating them from background.
shots.action_brief: Mira studies Nara's stolen map and lays it over archived infrastructure data. Her finger traces a route. A new path appears: leading toward the outer wall. She doesn't smile — she calculates.
shots.lighting_context: Amber LED under-table glow as key on Mira's face — warm, from below. Neon cyan trace from left wall catching Nara's cheek. Market depth: amber and cyan contrast behind. Atmospheric haze.
shots.emotion_intent: Mira is reading the city the way engineers read structural drawings. This is her language.
shots.audio_brief: Market ambient — dozens of low voices, signal static, equipment hum. Mira's finger on the display surface. The display sound as the new route appears.

shots.composition: Two-shot, tight. Mira slightly behind and right, Nara in foreground left. Both looking at the display between them. The question about survival hanging in the space.
shots.action_brief: Mira says: 'The better question is whether you survive after I do.' Nara holds Mira's look. Neither blinks. A decision is being made in this silence.
shots.lighting_context: Display glow as fill on both faces — cold blue from the infrastructure map. Market amber from behind as separation light.
shots.emotion_intent: Two people calculating each other's risk. Both reaching the same conclusion at the same speed.
shots.audio_brief: Market ambient drops slightly — subjective focus narrowing. Mira's line, delivered level. The silence after. Market returns.

shots.composition: Wall of monitors fills left two-thirds of frame — live city schematic with moving data points. Analysts at stations in middle ground. Vale standing 2m back, arms behind, barely visible — near-silhouette against the display wall.
shots.action_brief: Live city schematic tracks a movement signature converging on the outer sectors. Analysts update coordinates without speaking. Vale watches — and does not give the order to intercept.
shots.lighting_context: Screen wall: cold cyan-blue 6500K key on all analyst faces — from the front. Overhead near-zero. Vale: backlit only — cold edge from exterior window. Near-silhouette.
shots.emotion_intent: The watcher watching. He chooses not to act — which is itself an action.
shots.audio_brief: Data terminal sounds — soft, continuous. No speech. The HVAC of the ops centre. Vale's shoes on the floor — one step, stopping.

shots.composition: Tight on Vale — centre-frame. The display wall's cold blue glow on his face. Window rim-light behind. He faces camera slightly off-axis.
shots.action_brief: He says: 'If she reaches the gate, I want to know what she thinks she saw.' A pause. 'Don't stop her.' His eyes remain on the display. His decision is already made.
shots.lighting_context: Display wall: cold cyan-blue face-front light. Window cold backlight behind. Ratio 9:1. No warmth on his face anywhere.
shots.emotion_intent: Calculation wearing a face. He is not suppressing emotion — he genuinely has none about this.
shots.audio_brief: His voice: completely flat, no rise or fall. The pause between the two sentences is deliberate — he is not uncertain, he is precise. Then analyst keyboards resuming.

shots.composition: Extreme vanishing-point perspective with Nara left-of-centre foreground, Mira smaller at right mid-ground — both descending into the tunnel depth. Floor-level green emergency strips creating long horizontal shadows.
shots.action_brief: Nara and Mira move through the tunnel — Nara first, one hand on the pipe bundle at the wall. Mira three steps behind. Both moving without hesitation — they've committed to this.
shots.lighting_context: Floor-level green fluorescent strips at right wall — green 4000K up-light from extreme low angle. Amber control panel glow at mid-distance. Deep darkness ahead. Their faces lit green from below.
shots.emotion_intent: Two people descending into the city's hidden skeleton. The tunnel has been here for decades — waiting.
shots.audio_brief: Tunnel ambient — low, organic, the sound of the earth above. Their footsteps on old concrete and track bed. Distant water drip. Mira's kit, faint clink of gear.

shots.composition: Mira close, slightly right-of-centre — hands at the control panel, face lit by the amber OLED glow from below. Nara out-of-focus at left behind her, watching the dark passage.
shots.action_brief: Mira powers up the buried control panel. Capacitor whine. Relay clicks. Amber gauges lighting up one by one. Her face intent — reading the system.
shots.lighting_context: Control panel amber OLED glow — the only warm light in the tunnel. Lighting her face from directly below. Green floor strips provide cold ambient fill from behind.
shots.emotion_intent: She's talked to machines like this her whole life. This one is just older.
shots.audio_brief: Capacitor whine — 4kHz rising tone. Relay click — sharp, mechanical. Gauges powering up — each one a faint indicator beep. The system waking from decades of sleep.

shots.composition: Tight on Nara — facing camera, watching the dark passage behind them. Her face in green under-light. The darkness behind her is the threat.
shots.action_brief: Nara watches the dark passage while Mira works. She says nothing. She is counting something — footsteps, seconds. She doesn't like being in the open.
shots.lighting_context: Green floor strips as key — cold from below, long shadows upward. Amber panel glow as very faint warm bounce from behind.
shots.emotion_intent: Tactical awareness. She is providing overwatch while Mira works. Professional.
shots.audio_brief: Mira working behind her — gauges, relays. Nara's breathing, controlled. Silence from the dark passage. That silence is the threat.

shots.composition: On Mira's hands at the panel, then pulling to her face as the gate-unlock mechanism sounds.
shots.action_brief: The system identifies an external containment access route. Mira reads the identifier. Her expression shifts — this is not what she expected. She unlocks the gate. A deep mechanical clunk.
shots.lighting_context: Panel amber glow. The gate-unlock indicator light: a single green LED point-source adding a cold green catch-light in her eyes.
shots.emotion_intent: She expected a maintenance access. What she's found is something that shouldn't exist.
shots.audio_brief: System identifier display — a soft data chirp. Her pause. Then: gate unlock mechanism — deep, massive, mechanical clunk resonating through the tunnel walls. The sound of something sealed for decades being opened.

shots.camera_spec: 32mm anamorphic, T2.3, ISO 800, tripod, low position
shots.composition: Nara and Mira small at left foreground — dwarfed by the chamber's machinery and scale. The shutters filling the right two-thirds, beginning to open. Light bleeding through the growing gap.
shots.action_brief: Ancient mechanical shutters begin to open — motor strain, steel groaning. The gap widens. Cold grey-blue light from outside grows. Both characters are silhouetted against the opening.
shots.lighting_context: Red alarm: ceiling wash — all interior surfaces red. Opening shutters: cold exterior grey-blue growing stronger. Two-source war: warm red interior vs cold exterior revelation.
shots.emotion_intent: The world they were told was dead is lighting up in front of them. The revelation is not dramatic — it is quiet and devastating.
shots.audio_brief: Shutter motor — massive, strained, decade-old mechanism. Steel groan as the slats separate. Then: through the gap — wind from outside. The sound of an exterior world. The first sound not filtered through the city's systems.

shots.composition: Tight on Nara's face — centre-frame. The exterior light source at camera-right, cold and growing. Her expression transitioning from caution to disbelief.
shots.action_brief: She sees organised lights far beyond the wall. Ordered grid. Moving vehicles. She says 'They lied.' She says it very quietly, like a diagnosis.
shots.lighting_context: Cold grey-blue exterior light from right as key — 7000K, hard edge on right cheek. Red alarm wash from above as fill — very faint, orange-red bounce. The exterior light wins.
shots.emotion_intent: The specific, precise texture of realising your entire life was built on a lie. Not anger — not yet.
shots.audio_brief: Exterior world sounds through the opening — wind, distant traffic, industrial hum of a functioning city. Her line: delivered barely above a whisper. 'They lied.' The two words barely audible over the outside world.

shots.composition: Nara at right, the pumping machinery at left filling half the frame. She is looking down at what the machinery is connected to — the pipe bundles leading down through the floor.
shots.action_brief: She sees industrial pumps in the wall structure. The pipes lead down — down to the lower sectors. She understands what the infrastructure is for. Poison in the water. Hidden in plain sight.
shots.lighting_context: Red alarm ceiling wash — machinery all red. Cold exterior through shutters behind her. Her face: caught between both sources.
shots.emotion_intent: The second blow. The first was discovering the lie. The second is understanding the crime.
shots.audio_brief: Pump machinery — low, constant, the sound of poison being delivered. She makes no sound. The hum of the pumps is the sound of the crime.

shots.composition: Mira pulling Nara by the arm toward the tunnel entrance. Both in red alarm wash. The shutters beginning to close behind them.
shots.action_brief: The silent alarm floods the chamber red. Mira grabs Nara's arm: 'We need to go. Now.' Nara takes one last look at the outside lights before being pulled back into the tunnel.
shots.lighting_context: Full red alarm wash — all surfaces crimson. Exterior light now closing as shutters begin to reverse.
shots.emotion_intent: The urgency is Mira's — cold and tactical. The grief is Nara's — she hasn't finished looking.
shots.audio_brief: Silent alarm activates — visual only, no klaxon. Shutter motor reversing — the exterior sound beginning to close off. Mira's grip on Nara's arm. Nara's last breath before the shutters seal.

shots.camera_spec: 32mm anamorphic, T2.3, ISO 3200, handheld at sprint
shots.composition: Nara left, Mira right, both sprinting toward camera. Blast doors slamming sequentially behind them — depth collapsing in the pursuit.
shots.action_brief: Security shutters slam down the corridor behind them — sequential, one every second, getting closer. Both sprinting at full speed, ducking under the last shutter. Pure kinetic energy.
shots.lighting_context: Red alarm from above. Blast door sparks: white burst on each slam. Weapon-mounted lights from behind — cold 5600K sweeping. Smoke and dust scattering all sources.
shots.emotion_intent: Pursuit. The machinery of the state, now in motion.
shots.audio_brief: Blast doors slamming — each one a massive percussive impact, 1 second apart, getting closer. Their sprinting footsteps. Red alarm pulse — low, rhythmic. Then: armed unit comms in the distance.

shots.camera_spec: 32mm anamorphic, T2.3, ISO 3200, tripod at far end
shots.composition: Armed units at the far tunnel entrance — silhouetted against bright HMI backlight from the corridor junction behind them. They advance in formation, weapon lights sweeping.
shots.action_brief: Armed units pour into the shaft entrance at the far end. Tactical movement, weapon lights cutting through dust. Vale's voice over comms: 'Nara Voss. Stop running. The truth is not what you think it is.'
shots.lighting_context: HMI backlight from junction behind — silhouetting the unit figures. Weapon lights from units sweeping toward camera. Dust scattering all sources.
shots.emotion_intent: The state's precision against human panic. They are not rushing — they've already won, they just don't know it yet.
shots.audio_brief: Unit radio clicks — tactical comms, no words audible. Boot cadence — disciplined, unhurried. Vale's voice over comms: clean, almost gentle. 'The truth is not what you think it is.' — the most chilling line in the episode.

shots.composition: Mira at a side-duct opening at right — one arm reaching in, one foot already inside. She looks back once, then disappears.
shots.action_brief: Mira finds the side duct — she knows this infrastructure, she mapped it. She goes. No goodbye. Tactical.
shots.lighting_context: Red alarm. Weapon lights sweeping past the duct opening — brief flash of cold light across her as she enters.
shots.emotion_intent: She's not abandoning Nara — she's covering a different escape route. She expects Nara to understand.
shots.audio_brief: Her footsteps stopping. One look back — her breath. Then: into the duct. The sound of her body entering the vent space. Then she is gone.

shots.composition: Nara at a blast door that is closing — she slips through the narrowing gap as weapon lights reach her position. The door closes. She is gone.
shots.action_brief: She dives through the closing blast door — barely. The door slams. The weapon lights reach the door surface — too late.
shots.lighting_context: Red alarm. Weapon lights from behind. The closing blast door: sparks at the seam. Then dark.
shots.emotion_intent: Escape. By the minimum possible margin.
shots.audio_brief: The blast door mechanism — hydraulic, massive. Her body through the gap — fabric on steel. The door sealing — final, absolute. Weapon lights on the door surface — then silence on her side.

shots.composition: Nara entering through the apartment door — centre-frame, backlit by the faint pre-dawn blue from the window. Soaked, shaking slightly. The apartment in near-darkness around her.
shots.action_brief: She returns home — wet, shaken, changed. She closes the door quietly behind her. She is carrying something enormous and trying not to show it.
shots.lighting_context: Pre-dawn cold blue from window — the only source. Lighting her silhouette edge, not her face. Her face in near-total darkness.
shots.emotion_intent: She has just seen the world she lives in for what it actually is. Everything that comes next begins here.
shots.state_override: Dark hair wet and plastered to neck and temples. Jacket soaked through at shoulders and back. Skin: water drops catching blue light. Fatigue in jaw and shoulders. Slight visible tremor.
shots.audio_brief: Door latch — barely audible. Distant city ambient bleeding through walls. Her breathing, slowing.

shots.composition: Tight on Elian's face as he sees her. He has been awake, waiting. His expression when he reads her face.
shots.action_brief: Elian sees her face and knows. He doesn't speak. He doesn't need to. The secret he has carried for years has just walked through the door.
shots.lighting_context: Cold pre-dawn window light from frame-right. His face: cool blue edge on the left cheek, near-darkness on the right.
shots.emotion_intent: Recognition. He always knew this day was coming. He hoped it wouldn't be this soon.
shots.audio_brief: Silence. His breath. Nothing else.

shots.composition: Tight on Nara — she has just heard it. The revelation about her father's role. Her face absorbing it.
shots.action_brief: She recoils — not physically, internally. He says 'I helped design part of the flow control system.' The truth lands between them. She doesn't look away.
shots.lighting_context: Cold blue from window. Both faces in the same cold light. No warmth. The warmth is gone.
shots.emotion_intent: Betrayal and love fighting at the same moment. She doesn't know which will win.
shots.state_override: Still wet — jacket darkened at shoulders. Hair beginning to separate from wet press, single strands catching the cold blue light.
shots.audio_brief: His voice delivering the confession. Then silence in which she processes it. The apartment's small sounds — distant pipe, neon. Not a score cue. Just her face in the blue light.

shots.composition: Elian producing an encrypted drive from inside his jacket — holds it out to her. His face: this is the only act of courage he has left.
shots.action_brief: He gives her the encrypted drive. His hands are not steady. He says: 'If they take me, this is the only thing that proves the system was built this way.'
shots.lighting_context: Cold pre-dawn blue. His hands in slightly better light than his face — the drive in a thin cold beam.
shots.emotion_intent: Atonement, not absolution. He knows it's too late for forgiveness. He's doing it anyway.
shots.audio_brief: His jacket opening — fabric. The drive placed in his palm — small, dense, plastic and metal. His hands not steady — the drive trembles slightly. His voice, lower than before.

shots.composition: Two-shot — Elian giving the instructions, Nara receiving them. The space between them: the width of what cannot be repaired.
shots.action_brief: He says: 'Go to the freight tunnels. Find the relay called Lantern. Ask for Mira Sol. Open the city.' She takes the drive. Holds it. Her face: this is not what she wanted from him.
shots.lighting_context: Cold pre-dawn shared light. Equal on both faces. Neither in shadow — no one hiding from the other now.
shots.emotion_intent: The handoff of a mission that will consume what remains of both their lives.
shots.state_override: Nara still wet. The drive in her wet hands.
shots.audio_brief: His voice — the four instructions, spoken as if memorised for years. Her hands closing around the drive — the sound of the cold plastic against her wet fingers. Then: silence.

shots.camera_spec: 50mm anamorphic, T2.8, ISO 3200, tripod on apartment door
shots.composition: Extreme close — the apartment door lock housing. A thin line of corridor light under the door. Then: a shadow moving under the door. Then a second shadow.
shots.action_brief: Tactical boots in the corridor outside — heard, then the shadow confirmed under the door. Heavy, deliberate, multiple pairs. Closing distance.
shots.lighting_context: Interior pre-dawn blue. Corridor: cold white unit lighting under the door gap — a thin warning stripe.
shots.emotion_intent: The last seconds. The knock that doesn't knock.
shots.audio_brief: Total silence inside. Then: footsteps in the corridor — heavy, tactical, boot soles. Getting closer. Stopping outside the door. The silence after they stop is worse than the footsteps.

shots.camera_spec: 32mm anamorphic, T2.3, ISO 3200, tripod wide, capturing both figures and the door
shots.composition: Wide — both characters frame-right, door frame-left. The scale of the threat against the intimacy of the people. Then the door detonates.
shots.action_brief: The door explodes inward. White flash. SMASH CUT TO BLACK. End of Episode 1.
shots.lighting_context: Pre-dawn blue throughout. Then: door detonation — white flash, 1/24sec, burning out the frame. Then absolute black.
shots.emotion_intent: End of the world they knew. Beginning of everything that follows.
shots.audio_brief: SILENCE — 2 seconds of absolute silence before the breach. Then: DOOR DETONATION — shaped charge, immediate and overwhelming. White noise. SMASH CUT TO BLACK — silence again, total. End of episode.
